response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams of 30+, or designing financial risk/credit systems — critical requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Demonstrated hands-on work with agentic frameworks and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven experience building event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit track record in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulated AI deployment
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No demonstrated experience with real-time inference systems, financial liquidity optimization, or model-agnostic AI architecture
